message:
fix(grpc): fix compilation errors and re-enable grpc module

- Fix Request.message() to Request.get_ref() in health.rs
- Implement manual Debug for InterceptorLayer (dyn Interceptor doesn't impl Debug)
- Remove unused Code import from interceptor.rs, add to test module
- Re-enable grpc module in lib.rs (was commented out due to compilation issues)
- Apply cargo fmt formatting to grpc files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
